text:

Author: tagattie

Log:
  - Update to 1.4.3
  - Redefine NLS option handling
  - Add USES=localbase:ldflags instead of LDFLAGS+=-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
  - Substitute command sha256sum by sha256 in Makefile.in files
